heroParagraphs: I'm a passionate developer with over a decade of experience building clean web applications and reliable backend systems. I enjoy writing clean, readable code, that is both maintainable and efficient. I originally set out to become a game designer, but stumbled into software development by chance and it stuck. I'm not mad though as I really enjoy the process of building and maintaining software and there is always something new to learn or improve on. I'm always refining, refactoring and building upon prior experiences.
goalText: Keep building things I’m proud of and helping people ship great software, while staying curious and always improving the craft.
